judge_reason: Description A claims there are no specific, legible stamp texts, while Description B quotes two distinct inverted stamps with precise dates and text ('OCT 30 1955', 'RECEIVED', 'RECEIVED - MAIL ROOM / FBI / U.S. DEPT OF JUSTICE / OCT 29 11 55 AM '55'), creating a direct contradiction on the presence and content of visual elements.
original_image_tags: Aged, off-white or light-yellow paper document, likely a carbon copy or back of a page. Two hole-punch marks at the top. Faint, reversed (mirrored) typewritten text is visible through the paper from the other side, indicating this is the reverse side of a document. Several stamps and handwritten notations are present.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A single scanned document page, mostly blank and faded, with faint typed text, three black hole punches along the top edge, a red rectangular stamp near the lower right, and upside-down typed text near the bottom.*
